### apps/renderer/src/ambient.d.ts

```ts
// apps/renderer/src/ambient.d.ts

import type { ClientbookIpcApi } from "@clientbook/contract";

declare global {
    interface Window {
        clientbook: ClientbookIpcApi;
    }
}

export {};
```

### apps/renderer/src/App.tsx

```tsx
// apps/renderer/src/App.tsx
import { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from "react";

import { ClientsPage } from "./ui/clients/ClientsPage";
import type { ClientDraft, ClientRow } from "./ui/clients/types";
import { Titlebar } from "./ui/TitleBar";

function getApi() {
    const api = window.clientbook;
    if (!api) throw new Error("IPC bridge not available (preload missing): window.clientbook is undefined");
    return api;
}

export function App() {
    const [search, setSearch] = useState("");
    const [rows, setRows] = useState<ClientRow[]>([]);
    const [draft, setDraft] = useState<ClientDraft | null>(null);

    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    const [err, setErr] = useState<string | null>(null);

    async function refresh(nextSearch?: string) {
        const q = (nextSearch ?? search).trim();
        try {
            setLoading(true);
            setErr(null);

            const api = getApi();
            const list = await api.clients.list(q.length ? q : undefined);

            // list is unknown/any from preload boundary; treat it as ClientRow[] after your own checks.
            setRows(list as ClientRow[]);
        } catch (e) {
            setErr(e instanceof Error ? e.message : "Failed to load clients");
        } finally {
            setLoading(false);
        }
    }

    useEffect(() => {
        void refresh("");
        // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps
    }, []);

    const subtitle = useMemo(() => {
        if (loading) return "Loading…";
        if (err) return err;
        return `${rows.length} client${rows.length === 1 ? "" : "s"}`;
    }, [loading, err, rows.length]);

    return (
        <div className="appRoot">
            <Titlebar
                title="ClientBook"
                subtitle={subtitle}
                search={search}
                onSearchChange={setSearch}
                onSearchCommit={() => void refresh(search)}
                onNew={() => {
                    setDraft({
                        company_name: "",
                        bn: "",
                        year_end_date: null,
                        can: null,
                        notes: null,
                        tags: [],
                    });
                }}
                onRefresh={() => void refresh()}
            />

            <main className="appMain">
                <ClientsPage
                    rows={rows}
                    loading={loading}
                    error={err}
                    onChangeRows={setRows}
                    onRefresh={() => void refresh()}
                    // NEW: pass draft into page so it can render an editable "new client" row/card
                    draft={draft}
                    onDraftChange={setDraft}
                />
            </main>
        </div>
    );
}
```

### apps/renderer/src/env.d.ts

```ts
/// <reference types="vite/client" />

import type { ClientBookApi } from "@clientbook/contract";

declare global {
    /**
     * Electron preload bridge (renderer → main)
     *
     * This is the SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH.
     * Full interface lives in @clientbook/contract (added as workspace:* dependency).
     * No more duplication or simplified types.
     */
    interface Window {
        /** Full typed ClientBook API (clients, profiles, links, runs, worker, window controls) */
        clientbook?: ClientBookApi;
    }
}

export {};
```

### apps/renderer/src/main.tsx

```tsx
import React from "react";
import ReactDOM from "react-dom/client";
import { App } from "./App";
import "./styles/base.css";

ReactDOM.createRoot(document.getElementById("root")!).render(
    <React.StrictMode>
        <App />
    </React.StrictMode>
);
```

### apps/renderer/src/styles/base.css

```css
/* apps/renderer/src/styles/base.css */

/* ============================================================================
   ClientBook — Minimal Dense UI
   - Compact controls (30px)
   - Consistent grid sizing (actions never squeezed)
   - Frameless titlebar safe padding via --titlebar-h (set by main)
   ========================================================================== */

:root{
    --bg: #0b0c0f;
    --panel: #0f1117;
    --panel2: #0c0f14;

    --muted: rgba(255,255,255,.60);
    --text: rgba(255,255,255,.92);

    --line: rgba(255,255,255,.08);
    --line2: rgba(255,255,255,.12);

    --bad: rgba(255,90,90,.95);
    --ok: rgba(110,255,170,.90);

    --shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.35);

    --r: 12px;
    --r2: 10px;

    --pad: 10px;

    --h: 30px;
    --hSm: 28px;

    --titlebar-h: 34px; /* overridden by main window.ts */

    --mono: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Liberation Mono", "Courier New", monospace;
    --sans: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, "Apple Color Emoji","Segoe UI Emoji";
}

*{ box-sizing:border-box; }
html, body { height:100%; }

body{
    margin:0;
    background: var(--bg);
    color: var(--text);
    font-family: var(--sans);
    -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
    -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
}

/* Scrollbars (subtle) */
*{
    scrollbar-width: thin;
    scrollbar-color: rgba(255,255,255,.18) transparent;
}
*::-webkit-scrollbar{ width: 10px; height: 10px; }
*::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{
    background: rgba(255,255,255,.18);
    border-radius: 999px;
    border: 2px solid transparent;
    background-clip: padding-box;
}
*::-webkit-scrollbar-track{ background: transparent; }

/* App shell */
.appRoot{
    height:100%;
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
    min-height:0;
}

/* If you're NOT rendering a React TitleBar inside the renderer (native overlay only),
   uncomment next line to push content below the overlay. If you ARE rendering TitleBar,
   keep it commented to avoid double spacing. */
/* .appRoot{ padding-top: var(--titlebar-h); } */

.appMain{
    flex:1;
    padding: 12px;
    overflow:auto;
    min-height:0;
}

/* ============================================================================
   Titlebar (renderer) — for frameless custom bar
   - Use .drag for draggable region
   - Use .noDrag on inputs/buttons
   ========================================================================== */

.titlebar{
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    justify-content:space-between;
    padding: 10px 12px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
    background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(255,255,255,.03), rgba(255,255,255,0));
    min-height: var(--titlebar-h);
}

.drag{ -webkit-app-region: drag; }
.noDrag{ -webkit-app-region: no-drag; }

.titlebarLeft{
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap: 12px;
    min-width: 0;
}

.brand{
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
    line-height:1.1;
    min-width: 0;
}
.brandTitle{
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 650;
    letter-spacing: .2px;
    white-space: nowrap;
    overflow: hidden;
    text-overflow: ellipsis;
}
.brandSub{
    font-size: 11px;
    color: var(--muted);
    white-space: nowrap;
    overflow: hidden;
    text-overflow: ellipsis;
}

/* Search */
.searchWrap{
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap: 6px;
    padding: 6px;
    border: 1px solid var(--line);
    border-radius: 999px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,.02);
    min-width: 320px;
    max-width: 560px;
}
.searchInput{
    width: 100%;
    border: none;
    outline: none;
    background: transparent;
    color: var(--text);
    font-size: 12px;
}
.searchInput::placeholder{ color: rgba(255,255,255,.35); }

.titlebarRight{
    display:flex;
    gap: 8px;
}

/* ============================================================================
   Buttons / Inputs
   ========================================================================== */

.btn{
    height: var(--h);
    padding: 0 10px;
    border-radius: 999px;
    border: 1px solid var(--line2);
    background: rgba(255,255,255,.04);
    color: var(--text);
    font-size: 12px;
    cursor:pointer;
    user-select:none;
}
.btn:hover{ background: rgba(255,255,255,.06); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,.16); }
.btn:active{ transform: translateY(1px); }
.btn:disabled{ opacity:.55; cursor: default; transform:none; }
.btn.ghost{ background: transparent; border-color: var(--line); }
.btn.danger{ color: rgba(255,120,120,.95); }
.btn.sm{ height: var(--hSm); padding: 0 9px; }

.inp{
    width:100%;
    height: var(--h);
    padding: 0 10px;
    border-radius: var(--r2);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.10);
    background: rgba(0,0,0,.25);
    color: var(--text);
    font-size: 12px;
    outline: none;
    min-width: 0;
}
.inp:focus{
    border-color: rgba(255,255,255,.22);
    background: rgba(0,0,0,.35);
}
.inp::placeholder{ color: rgba(255,255,255,.35); }
.inp.mono{ font-family: var(--mono); font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: .2px; }
.inp.invalid{ border-color: rgba(255,90,90,.55); }

.cellInput{ /* backwards compat for existing markup */
    width:100%;
    height: var(--h);
    padding: 0 10px;
    border-radius: var(--r2);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.10);
    background: rgba(0,0,0,.25);
    color: var(--text);
    font-size: 12px;
    outline: none;
    min-width: 0;
}
.cellInput:focus{ border-color: rgba(255,255,255,.22); background: rgba(0,0,0,.35); }
.cellInput.mono{ font-family: var(--mono); font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: .2px; }
.cellInput.invalid{ border-color: rgba(255,90,90,.55); }

/* ============================================================================
   Panels / Table
   ========================================================================== */

.panel{
    border: 1px solid var(--line);
    border-radius: var(--r);
    background: rgba(255,255,255,.02);
    overflow:hidden;
    min-width: 0;
}

.tableHeader{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1.7fr 120px 120px 160px 220px; /* CO | BN | YE | CAN | Actions */
    gap: 10px;
    padding: 10px 12px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
    background: rgba(255,255,255,.02);
}
.th{
    font-size: 11px;
    color: var(--muted);
    letter-spacing: .2px;
}

.tableBody{ display:flex; flex-direction:column; }

.emptyState{
    padding: 14px 12px;
    color: var(--muted);
    font-size: 12px;
}

.tr{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1.7fr 120px 120px 160px 220px; /* match header */
    gap: 10px;
    padding: 8px 12px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
    align-items:center;
}
.tr:last-child{ border-bottom: none; }
.tr:hover{ background: rgba(255,255,255,.02); }
.tr.editing{ background: rgba(255,255,255,.03); }

.td{ min-width: 0; }

/* Ensure company name truncates cleanly */
.td:first-child{
    min-width:0;
}
.td:first-child .cellInput,
.td:first-child .inp{
    font-weight: 650;
    letter-spacing: .2px;
}

/* Keep actions visible, never wrap */
.rowActions{
    display:flex;
    justify-content:flex-end;
    gap: 8px;
    flex-wrap: nowrap;
    white-space: nowrap;
    min-width: 0;
}

/* Responsive: shrink CAN first, keep Actions fixed */
@media (max-width: 980px){
    .tableHeader, .tr{
        grid-template-columns: 1.6fr 120px 120px 140px 220px;
    }
}
@media (max-width: 880px){
    .tableHeader, .tr{
        grid-template-columns: 1.6fr 120px 120px 1fr 220px;
    }
}

/* ============================================================================
   Popover / Modal-like
   ========================================================================== */

.popoverHost{ position: relative; }
.popoverPortal{ position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 50; }
.popoverBackdrop{ position: absolute; inset:0; background: transparent; }

.popover{
    position: fixed;
    width: 360px;
    border: 1px solid var(--line2);
    border-radius: var(--r);
    background: var(--panel2);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow);
    padding: 10px;
}

.popoverCard{ display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap: 8px; }
.popoverTitle{ font-size: 11px; color: var(--muted); letter-spacing:.2px; }
.muted{ color: var(--muted); font-size: 11px; }

.ta{
    width: 100%;
    min-height: 110px;
    resize: vertical;
    padding: 10px;
    border-radius: var(--r2);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.10);
    background: rgba(0,0,0,.25);
    color: var(--text);
    font-size: 12px;
    outline: none;
    line-height: 1.35;
}
.ta:focus{ border-color: rgba(255,255,255,.22); background: rgba(0,0,0,.35); }

.popoverFooter{
    display:flex;
    justify-content:flex-end;
    gap: 8px;
    margin-top: 4px;
}

/* ============================================================================
   Toasts
   ========================================================================== */

.toastHost{
    position: fixed;
    right: 12px;
    bottom: 12px;
    z-index: 60;
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
    gap: 8px;
}

.toast{
    border: 1px solid var(--line2);
    border-radius: 999px;
    padding: 8px 10px;
    font-size: 12px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,.04);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow);
    cursor: default;
}
.toast.ok{ border-color: rgba(110,255,170,.20); }
.toast.err{ border-color: rgba(255,90,90,.22); }

/* ============================================================================
   Utility
   ========================================================================== */

.mono{ font-family: var(--mono); }
```

### apps/renderer/src/ui/clients/ClientRowView.tsx

```tsx
// apps/renderer/src/ui/clients/ClientRowView.tsx
import { useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from "react";
import type { ClientDraft, ClientId, ClientRow, IsoDate } from "./types";
import { Popover } from "../popover/Popover";

function cleanBn(s: string) {
    return s.replace(/[^\d]/g, "").slice(0, 9);
}

function cleanCan(s: string) {
    return s.replace(/[^\d]/g, "").slice(0, 9);
}

function isValidYmd(s: string) {
    if (!/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/.test(s)) return false;
    const dt = new Date(`${s}T00:00:00Z`);
    return !Number.isNaN(dt.getTime()) && dt.toISOString().slice(0, 10) === s;
}

// New-row sentinel: keep it in UI only (not a real ClientId)
const NEW_ROW_ID = "__new__" as const;
type NewRowId = typeof NEW_ROW_ID;

export type ClientRowViewRow = ClientRow | Readonly<{ id: NewRowId } & Omit<ClientRow, "id">>;

export function ClientRowView(props: {
    row: ClientRowViewRow;
    busy: boolean;

    // Save returns {id} (matches preload) or string if you prefer; we ignore return in UI.
    onSave: (draft: ClientDraft) => Promise<{ id: string } | string | void>;

    // Delete supports real ids and the NEW_ROW sentinel to cancel/remove draft rows
    onDelete: (id: ClientId | NewRowId) => Promise<void> | void;
}) {
    const r = props.row;

    const isNew = r.id === NEW_ROW_ID;

    const [editing, setEditing] = useState(isNew);
    const [openMore, setOpenMore] = useState(false);

    const [company, setCompany] = useState((r as any).company_name ?? "");
    const [bn, setBn] = useState((r as any).bn ?? "");
    const [ye, setYe] = useState((r as any).year_end_date ?? "");
    const [can, setCan] = useState((r as any).can ?? "");
    const [notes, setNotes] = useState((r as any).notes ?? "");
    const [tags, setTags] = useState((((r as any).tags ?? []) as string[]).join(", ") ?? "");

    const companyRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement | null>(null);

    useEffect(() => {
        // If parent refreshed, keep in sync unless actively editing
        if (editing) return;

        setCompany((r as any).company_name ?? "");
        setBn((r as any).bn ?? "");
        setYe((r as any).year_end_date ?? "");
        setCan((r as any).can ?? "");
        setNotes((r as any).notes ?? "");
        setTags((((r as any).tags ?? []) as string[]).join(", ") ?? "");
        // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps
    }, [
        r.id,
        (r as any).company_name,
        (r as any).bn,
        (r as any).year_end_date,
        (r as any).can,
        (r as any).notes,
        JSON.stringify((r as any).tags ?? []),
        editing,
    ]);

    useEffect(() => {
        if (editing) companyRef.current?.focus();
    }, [editing]);

    const hasChanges = useMemo(() => {
        const t = (((r as any).tags ?? []) as string[]).join(", ") ?? "";
        return (
            company !== ((r as any).company_name ?? "") ||
            bn !== ((r as any).bn ?? "") ||
            ye !== ((r as any).year_end_date ?? "") ||
            can !== ((r as any).can ?? "") ||
            notes !== ((r as any).notes ?? "") ||
            tags !== t
        );
    }, [company, bn, ye, can, notes, tags, r]);

    const bnOk = bn.length === 0 ? false : bn.length === 9;
    const yeOk = ye.length === 0 ? true : isValidYmd(ye);
    const canOk = can.length === 0 ? true : can.length === 9;

    const saveDisabled = props.busy || company.trim().length === 0 || !bnOk || !yeOk || !canOk || !hasChanges;

    async function commitSave() {
        const draft: ClientDraft = {
            id: isNew ? undefined : (r.id as ClientId),
            company_name: company.trim(),
            bn,
            year_end_date: ye.trim().length ? (ye.trim() as IsoDate) : null,
            can: can.trim().length ? can.trim() : null,
            notes: notes.trim().length ? notes : null,
            tags: tags
                .split(",")
                .map((x) => x.trim())
                .filter(Boolean),
        };

        await props.onSave(draft);

        setEditing(false);
        setOpenMore(false);
    }

    function cancel() {
        if (isNew) {
            void props.onDelete(NEW_ROW_ID);
            return;
        }

        setEditing(false);
        setOpenMore(false);

        setCompany((r as any).company_name ?? "");
        setBn((r as any).bn ?? "");
        setYe((r as any).year_end_date ?? "");
        setCan((r as any).can ?? "");
        setNotes((r as any).notes ?? "");
        setTags((((r as any).tags ?? []) as string[]).join(", ") ?? "");
    }

    return (
        <div className={"tr" + (editing ? " editing" : "")}>
            <div className="td company">
                <input
                    ref={companyRef}
                    className="cellInput"
                    value={company}
                    onChange={(e) => setCompany(e.target.value)}
                    onFocus={() => setEditing(true)}
                    placeholder="Company name"
                    spellCheck={false}
                />
            </div>

            <div className="td bn">
                <input
                    className={"cellInput mono" + (bnOk ? "" : " invalid")}
                    value={bn}
                    onChange={(e) => setBn(cleanBn(e.target.value))}
                    onFocus={() => setEditing(true)}
                    placeholder="123456789"
                    inputMode="numeric"
                    spellCheck={false}
                />
            </div>

            <div className="td ye">
                <input
                    className={"cellInput mono" + (yeOk ? "" : " invalid")}
                    value={ye}
                    onChange={(e) => setYe(e.target.value.trim())}
                    onFocus={() => setEditing(true)}
                    placeholder="YYYY-MM-DD"
                    spellCheck={false}
                />
            </div>

            <div className="td can">
                <input
                    className={"cellInput mono" + (canOk ? "" : " invalid")}
                    value={can}
                    onChange={(e) => setCan(cleanCan(e.target.value))}
                    onFocus={() => setEditing(true)}
                    placeholder="(optional)"
                    inputMode="numeric"
                    spellCheck={false}
                />
            </div>

            <div className="td actions">
                <div className="rowActions">
                    <button className="btn sm" disabled={saveDisabled} onClick={() => void commitSave()} type="button">
                        {props.busy ? "…" : "Save"}
                    </button>

                    <button
                        className="btn sm ghost"
                        onClick={() => setOpenMore((v) => !v)}
                        disabled={props.busy}
                        type="button"
                    >
                        More
                    </button>

                    <button
                        className="btn sm danger ghost"
                        onClick={() => void props.onDelete(r.id as any)}
                        disabled={props.busy || isNew}
                        title="Delete client"
                        type="button"
                    >
                        Del
                    </button>

                    <button
                        className="btn sm ghost"
                        onClick={cancel}
                        disabled={props.busy || (!editing && !hasChanges)}
                        type="button"
                    >
                        Esc
                    </button>
                </div>

                <Popover open={openMore} onOpenChange={setOpenMore} align="end">
                    <div className="popoverCard">
                        <div className="popoverTitle">Notes</div>
                        <textarea
                            className="ta"
                            value={notes}
                            onChange={(e) => {
                                setEditing(true);
                                setNotes(e.target.value);
                            }}
                            placeholder="Anything you want…"
                        />

                        <div className="popoverTitle" style={{ marginTop: 10 }}>
                            Tags <span className="muted">(comma-separated)</span>
                        </div>
                        <input
                            className="cellInput"
                            value={tags}
                            onChange={(e) => {
                                setEditing(true);
                                setTags(e.target.value);
                            }}
                            placeholder="corp, gst, payroll…"
                            spellCheck={false}
                        />

                        <div className="popoverFooter">
                            <button className="btn sm" disabled={saveDisabled} onClick={() => void commitSave()} type="button">
                                Save
                            </button>
                            <button className="btn sm ghost" onClick={cancel} type="button">
                                Cancel
                            </button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </Popover>
            </div>

            {/* keyboard handling */}
            <div
                tabIndex={-1}
                onKeyDown={(e) => {
                    if (!editing) return;
                    if (e.key === "Enter" && (e.ctrlKey || e.metaKey)) {
                        e.preventDefault();
                        void commitSave();
                    }
                    if (e.key === "Escape") {
                        e.preventDefault();
                        cancel();
                    }
                }}
            />
        </div>
    );
}
```

### apps/renderer/src/ui/clients/ClientsPage.tsx

```tsx
// apps/renderer/src/ui/clients/ClientsPage.tsx
import { useMemo, useState } from "react";
import type { ClientDraft, ClientId, ClientRow, IsoDate } from "./types";
import { ClientRowView } from "./ClientRowView";
import { ToastHost, useToasts } from "../toast/ToastHost";

function getApi() {
  const api = window.clientbook;
  if (!api) throw new Error("IPC bridge not available (preload missing): window.clientbook is undefined");
  return api;
}

function normalize(s: string) {
  return s.trim();
}

function isValidBn(bn: string): boolean {
  return /^\d{9}$/.test(bn.trim());
}

function isValidYmd(s: string): boolean {
  const t = s.trim();
  if (t.length === 0) return true; // allow blank -> null
  if (!/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/.test(t)) return false;
  const [yy, mm, dd] = t.split("-").map(Number);
  if (!yy || mm < 1 || mm > 12 || dd < 1 || dd > 31) return false;
  return true;
}

async function saveClient(draft: ClientDraft): Promise<void> {
  const api = getApi();
  await api.clients.upsert(draft);
}

async function deleteClient(id: ClientId): Promise<void> {
  const api = getApi();
  await api.clients.delete(id);
}

export function ClientsPage(props: {
  rows: ClientRow[];
  loading: boolean;
  error: string | null;
  onChangeRows: (rows: ClientRow[]) => void;
  onRefresh: () => void;

  // Draft create row (no fake "__new__" ids)
  draft: ClientDraft | null;
  onDraftChange: (d: ClientDraft | null) => void;
}) {
  const toast = useToasts();
  const [savingNew, setSavingNew] = useState(false);
  const [busyRowId, setBusyRowId] = useState<string | null>(null);

  const draftErrors = useMemo(() => {
    const d = props.draft;
    if (!d) return null;

    const bn = normalize(d.bn);
    const company = normalize(d.company_name);
    const ye = d.year_end_date ?? null;

    return {
      company: company.length ? null : "Company name required",
      bn: bn.length ? (isValidBn(bn) ? null : "BN must be 9 digits") : "BN required",
      ye: ye == null ? null : isValidYmd(String(ye)) ? null : "Year-end must be YYYY-MM-DD",
    };
  }, [props.draft]);

  const draftHasErrors = !!draftErrors && Object.values(draftErrors).some((x) => x !== null);

  async function saveDraft() {
    const d = props.draft;
    if (!d) return;

    if (draftHasErrors) {
      toast.err("Fix draft fields first");
      return;
    }

    try {
      setSavingNew(true);

      await saveClient({
        ...d,
        company_name: normalize(d.company_name),
        bn: normalize(d.bn),
        year_end_date: normalize(String(d.year_end_date ?? "")) ? (normalize(String(d.year_end_date ?? "")) as IsoDate) : null,
      });

      toast.ok("Client created ✓");
      props.onDraftChange(null);
      props.onRefresh();
    } catch (e) {
      toast.err(e instanceof Error ? e.message : "Failed to create client");
    } finally {
      setSavingNew(false);
    }
  }

  return (
    <div className="clientsPage">
      <ToastHost {...toast.bindings} />

      {/* New client draft row */}
      {props.draft ? (
        <div className="newClientRow">
          <div className="newClientGrid">
            <div className="field">
              <div className="label">Company</div>
              <input
                className="input"
                value={props.draft.company_name}
                onChange={(e) => props.onDraftChange({ ...props.draft!, company_name: e.target.value })}
                placeholder="Company name"
              />
              {draftErrors?.company ? <div className="hint err">{draftErrors.company}</div> : null}
            </div>

            <div className="field">
              <div className="label">BN</div>
              <input
                className="input"
                value={props.draft.bn}
                onChange={(e) => props.onDraftChange({ ...props.draft!, bn: e.target.value })}
                placeholder="123456789"
                inputMode="numeric"
              />
              {draftErrors?.bn ? <div className="hint err">{draftErrors.bn}</div> : null}
            </div>

            <div className="field">
              <div className="label">YE</div>
              <input
                className="input"
                value={props.draft.year_end_date ?? ""}
                onChange={(e) =>
                  props.onDraftChange({
                    ...props.draft!,
                    year_end_date: e.target.value.trim().length ? (e.target.value as IsoDate) : null,
                  })
                }
                placeholder="YYYY-MM-DD"
              />
              {draftErrors?.ye ? <div className="hint err">{draftErrors.ye}</div> : null}
            </div>

            <div className="field">
              <div className="label">CAN</div>
              <input
                className="input"
                value={props.draft.can ?? ""}
                onChange={(e) =>
                  props.onDraftChange({
                    ...props.draft!,
                    can: e.target.value.trim().length ? e.target.value : null,
                  })
                }
                placeholder="Access number"
              />
            </div>

            <div className="field span2">
              <div className="label">Notes</div>
              <input
                className="input"
                value={props.draft.notes ?? ""}
                onChange={(e) =>
                  props.onDraftChange({
                    ...props.draft!,
                    notes: e.target.value.trim().length ? e.target.value : null,
                  })
                }
                placeholder="Internal notes"
              />
            </div>

            <div className="actions">
              <button className="btn" onClick={() => void saveDraft()} disabled={savingNew || draftHasErrors} type="button">
                {savingNew ? "Saving…" : "Save"}
              </button>
              <button className="btn ghost" onClick={() => props.onDraftChange(null)} disabled={savingNew} type="button">
                Cancel
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      ) : null}

      {/* Existing clients */}
      <div className="clientsList">
        {props.rows.map((r) => (
          <ClientRowView
            key={r.id}
            row={r}
            busy={busyRowId === (r.id as unknown as string)}
            onSave={async (draft) => {
              try {
                setBusyRowId(r.id as unknown as string);
                await saveClient(draft);
                toast.ok("Saved ✓");
                props.onRefresh();
              } catch (e) {
                toast.err(e instanceof Error ? e.message : "Failed to save");
              } finally {
                setBusyRowId(null);
              }
            }}
            onDelete={async (id) => {
              // id can only be a real ClientId here (no "__new__")
              try {
                setBusyRowId(r.id as unknown as string);
                await deleteClient(id as ClientId);
                toast.ok("Deleted");
                props.onRefresh();
              } catch (e) {
                toast.err(e instanceof Error ? e.message : "Failed to delete");
              } finally {
                setBusyRowId(null);
              }
            }}
          />
        ))}
      </div>

      {props.loading ? <div className="pageNote">Loading…</div> : null}
      {props.error ? <div className="pageNote err">{props.error}</div> : null}
    </div>
  );
}
```

### apps/renderer/src/ui/clients/types.ts

```ts
// apps/renderer/src/ui/clients/types.ts

/**
 * Branded IDs keep accidental mixups from spreading.
 * (No runtime cost; purely TS.)
 */
type Brand<T, B extends string> = T & { readonly __brand: B };

export type ClientId = Brand<string, "ClientId">;
export type IsoDate = Brand<string, "IsoDate">; // "YYYY-MM-DD"
export type IsoDateTime = Brand<string, "IsoDateTime">; // ISO8601 timestamp

export type ClientRow = Readonly<{
    id: ClientId;
    company_name: string;
    bn: string; // 9 digits; validate in UI when editing
    year_end_date: IsoDate | null;
    can: string | null;
    notes: string | null;

    // Normalize: always present, never null (easier for UI)
    tags: readonly string[];

    created_at: IsoDateTime;
    updated_at: IsoDateTime;
}>;

export type ClientDraft = Readonly<{
    id?: ClientId;

    company_name: string;
    bn: string;

    year_end_date?: IsoDate | null;
    can?: string | null;
    notes?: string | null;

    // Draft allows undefined (not set) but never null
    tags?: readonly string[];
}>;

export type ClientPatch = Readonly<{
    id: ClientId;
    company_name?: string;
    bn?: string;
    year_end_date?: IsoDate | null;
    can?: string | null;
    notes?: string | null;
    tags?: readonly string[];
}>;

// Helpful UI helpers (pure typing; you can implement runtime elsewhere)
export type ClientSortKey = "company_name" | "bn" | "year_end_date" | "updated_at";
export type ClientFilter = Readonly<{
    q?: string;
    tag?: string;
}>;
```

### apps/renderer/src/ui/popover/Popover.tsx

```tsx
// apps/renderer/src/ui/popover/Popover.tsx
import { useEffect, useLayoutEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";

export function Popover(props: {
    open: boolean;
    onOpenChange: (v: boolean) => void;
    align?: "start" | "end";
    children: React.ReactNode;
}) {
    const hostRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement | null>(null);
    const cardRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement | null>(null);
    const [pos, setPos] = useState<{ top: number; left: number } | null>(null);

    useLayoutEffect(() => {
        if (!props.open) return;
        const host = hostRef.current;
        const card = cardRef.current;
        if (!host || !card) return;

        const r = host.getBoundingClientRect();
        const c = card.getBoundingClientRect();
        const pad = 8;

        const top = Math.min(window.innerHeight - c.height - pad, r.bottom + 6);
        const left =
            props.align === "end"
                ? Math.max(pad, Math.min(window.innerWidth - c.width - pad, r.right - c.width))
                : Math.max(pad, Math.min(window.innerWidth - c.width - pad, r.left));

        setPos({ top, left });
    }, [props.open, props.align]);

    useEffect(() => {
        if (!props.open) return;

        const onDown = (e: MouseEvent) => {
            const host = hostRef.current;
            const card = cardRef.current;
            const t = e.target as Node | null;
            if (!t) return;
            if (host?.contains(t)) return;
            if (card?.contains(t)) return;
            props.onOpenChange(false);
        };

        const onKey = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
            if (e.key === "Escape") props.onOpenChange(false);
        };

        window.addEventListener("mousedown", onDown, true);
        window.addEventListener("keydown", onKey);
        return () => {
            window.removeEventListener("mousedown", onDown, true);
            window.removeEventListener("keydown", onKey);
        };
    }, [props.open, props]);

    return (
        <div className="popoverHost" ref={hostRef}>
            {props.open ? (
                <div className="popoverPortal">
                    <div className="popoverBackdrop" />
                    <div
                        className="popover"
                        ref={cardRef}
                        style={pos ? { top: pos.top, left: pos.left } : undefined}
                    >
                        {props.children}
                    </div>
                </div>
            ) : null}
        </div>
    );
}
```

### apps/renderer/src/ui/TitleBar.tsx

```tsx
// apps/renderer/src/ui/Titlebar.tsx
import { useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from "react";

function winApi() {
    return window.clientbook?.window;
}

export function Titlebar(props: {
    title: string;
    subtitle?: string;
    search: string;
    onSearchChange: (v: string) => void;
    onSearchCommit: () => void;
    onNew: () => void;
    onRefresh: () => void;
}) {
    const inputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement | null>(null);
    const [maximized, setMaximized] = useState(false);

    const canWindowControls = useMemo(() => !!winApi(), []);

    useEffect(() => {
        const onKey = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
            // Cmd/Ctrl+K focuses search
            if ((e.ctrlKey || e.metaKey) && e.key.toLowerCase() === "k") {
                e.preventDefault();
                inputRef.current?.focus();
            }
            // Cmd/Ctrl+R refresh (prevent Electron reload)
            if ((e.ctrlKey || e.metaKey) && e.key.toLowerCase() === "r") {
                e.preventDefault();
                props.onRefresh();
            }
            // Cmd/Ctrl+N new
            if ((e.ctrlKey || e.metaKey) && e.key.toLowerCase() === "n") {
                e.preventDefault();
                props.onNew();
            }
        };
        window.addEventListener("keydown", onKey);
        return () => window.removeEventListener("keydown", onKey);
    }, [props.onNew, props.onRefresh]);

    useEffect(() => {
        let alive = true;

        async function poll() {
            if (!canWindowControls) return;
            try {
                const res = await winApi()?.isMaximized();
                if (!alive || !res) return;
                setMaximized(res.maximized);
            } catch {
                // ignore
            }
        }

        void poll();
        const id = window.setInterval(poll, 600);
        return () => {
            alive = false;
            window.clearInterval(id);
        };
    }, [canWindowControls]);

    const onMinimize = async () => {
        try {
            await winApi()?.minimize();
        } catch {
            // ignore
        }
    };

    const onToggleMax = async () => {
        try {
            const res = await winApi()?.toggleMaximize();
            if (res) setMaximized(res.maximized);
        } catch {
            // ignore
        }
    };

    const onClose = async () => {
        try {
            await winApi()?.close();
        } catch {
            // ignore
        }
    };

    return (
        <header className="titlebar">
            {/* Drag region: everything inside this div is draggable EXCEPT no-drag children */}
            <div className="titlebarDrag">
                <div className="titlebarLeft">
                    <div className="brand">
                        <div className="brandTitle">{props.title}</div>
                        {props.subtitle ? <div className="brandSub">{props.subtitle}</div> : null}
                    </div>

                    <div className="searchWrap noDrag">
                        <input
                            ref={inputRef}
                            className="searchInput"
                            value={props.search}
                            onChange={(e) => props.onSearchChange(e.target.value)}
                            onKeyDown={(e) => {
                                if (e.key === "Enter") props.onSearchCommit();
                                if (e.key === "Escape") (e.currentTarget as HTMLInputElement).blur();
                            }}
                            placeholder="Search (Company / BN / CAN)…"
                            spellCheck={false}
                        />
                        <button className="btn ghost" onClick={props.onSearchCommit} title="Search" type="button">
                            ↵
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div className="titlebarRight noDrag">
                    <button className="btn" onClick={props.onNew} title="New client (Ctrl/Cmd+N)" type="button">
                        New
                    </button>
                    <button className="btn ghost" onClick={props.onRefresh} title="Refresh (Ctrl/Cmd+R)" type="button">
                        Refresh
                    </button>
                    <button className="btn ghost" onClick={() => {}} title="More" type="button">
                        ⋯
                    </button>

                    {/* Window controls */}
                    <div className="winControls" aria-label="Window controls">
                        <button className="winBtn" onClick={onMinimize} title="Minimize" type="button">
                            —
                        </button>
                        <button
                            className="winBtn"
                            onClick={onToggleMax}
                            title={maximized ? "Restore" : "Maximize"}
                            type="button"
                        >
                            {maximized ? "❐" : "□"}
                        </button>
                        <button className="winBtn winBtnClose" onClick={onClose} title="Close" type="button">
                            ×
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </header>
    );
}
```

### apps/renderer/src/ui/toast/ToastHost.tsx

```tsx
// apps/renderer/src/ui/toast/ToastHost.tsx
import { useCallback, useMemo, useState } from "react";

export type Toast = { id: string; kind: "ok" | "err"; msg: string };

function uid() {
    return Math.random().toString(16).slice(2);
}

export function useToasts() {
    const [toasts, setToasts] = useState<Toast[]>([]);

    const push = useCallback((t: Omit<Toast, "id">) => {
        const id = uid();
        setToasts((x) => [...x, { id, ...t }]);
        window.setTimeout(() => {
            setToasts((x) => x.filter((y) => y.id !== id));
        }, 1800);
    }, []);

    const dismiss = useCallback((id: string) => {
        setToasts((x) => x.filter((y) => y.id !== id));
    }, []);

    // ergonomic helpers
    const ok = useCallback((msg: string) => push({ kind: "ok", msg }), [push]);
    const err = useCallback((msg: string) => push({ kind: "err", msg }), [push]);

    return useMemo(
        () => ({
            push,
            ok,
            err,
            bindings: { toasts, dismiss },
        }),
        [push, ok, err, toasts, dismiss]
    );
}

export function ToastHost(props: { toasts: Toast[]; dismiss: (id: string) => void }) {
    return (
        <div className="toastHost">
            {props.toasts.map((t) => (
                <div key={t.id} className={"toast " + t.kind} onMouseDown={() => props.dismiss(t.id)}>
                    {t.msg}
                </div>
            ))}
        </div>
    );
}
```

### apps/renderer/vite.config.ts

```ts
// apps/renderer/vite.config.ts
import { defineConfig } from "vite";
import react from "@vitejs/plugin-react";

export default defineConfig(({ mode }) => {
    const isDev = mode === "development";

    return {
        plugins: [react()],

        // Keep paths simple + predictable for Electron.
        // This ensures built assets resolve correctly when loaded from file://
        base: "./",

        server: {
            port: 5173,
            strictPort: true,

            // Important for Electron: bind to localhost explicitly.
            // (Electron loads http://localhost:5173, not the LAN IP.)
            host: "127.0.0.1",

            // If you ever load using a different hostname, this prevents "Invalid Host header"
            // allowedHosts: ["localhost", "127.0.0.1"],

            // HMR can be finicky in Electron; this makes it explicit.
            hmr: {
                host: "127.0.0.1",
                protocol: "ws",
                port: 5173,
            },
        },

        build: {
            outDir: "dist",
            emptyOutDir: true,

            // In dev you usually want maps; in prod they bloat.
            sourcemap: isDev,

            target: "es2022",

            rollupOptions: {
                output: {
                    // More predictable file names (helps when debugging Electron load issues).
                    // If you prefer hashed filenames for caching, remove these.
                    entryFileNames: "assets/index.js",
                    chunkFileNames: "assets/chunk-[name].js",
                    assetFileNames: "assets/[name][extname]",
                },
            },
        },

        // Cleaner console output
        clearScreen: false,
    };
});
```
